2605.12495.title: AlphaGRPO: Unlocking Self-Reflective Multimodal Generation in UMMs via Decompositional Verifiable Reward
2605.12495.paper_summary: In this paper, we propose AlphaGRPO, a novel framework that applies Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to AR-Diffusion Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) to enhance multimodal generation capabilities without an additional cold-start stage. Our approach unlocks the model's intrinsic potential to perform advanced reasoning tasks: Reasoning Text-to-Image Generation, where the model actively infers implicit user intents, and Self-Reflective Refinement, where it autonomously diagnoses and corrects misalignments in generated outputs. To address the challenge of providing stable supervision for real-world multimodal generation, we introduce the Decompositional Verifiable Reward (DVReward). Unlike holistic scalar rewards, DVReward utilizes an LLM to decompose complex user requests into atomic, verifiable semantic and quality questions, which are then evaluated by a general MLLM to provide reliable and interpretable feedback. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AlphaGRPO yields robust improvements across multimodal generation benchmarks, including GenEval, TIIF-Bench, DPG-Bench and WISE, while also achieving significant gains in editing tasks on GEdit without training on editing tasks. These results validate that our self-reflective reinforcement approach effectively leverages inherent understanding to guide high-fidelity generation. Project page: https://huangrh99.github.io/AlphaGRPO/
2605.12495.paper_summary_zh: 在本文中，我們提出了 AlphaGRPO，一個新穎的框架，將群體相對政策優化 (GRPO) 應用於 AR-Diffusion 統一多模態模型 (UMMs)，以增強多模態生成能力，而無需額外的冷啟動階段。<lb/>我們的方法釋放了模型內在的潛力，以執行先進的推理任務：推理文本到圖像生成，其中模型主動推斷隱含的用戶意圖，以及自我反思精煉，其中它自主診斷並修正生成輸出中的不一致。<lb/>為了解決為現實世界多模態生成提供穩定監督的挑戰，我們引入了可分解的可驗證獎勵 (DVReward)。<lb/>與整體標量獎勵不同，DVReward 利用大型語言模型 (LLM) 將複雜的用戶請求分解為原子、可驗證的語義和質量問題，然後由通用的多語言大型模型 (MLLM) 進行評估，以提供可靠且可解釋的反饋。<lb/>大量實驗表明，AlphaGRPO 在多模態生成基準測試中產生了穩健的改進，包括 GenEval、TIIF-Bench、DPG-Bench 和 WISE，同時在 GEdit 的編輯任務上也取得了顯著的增益，而無需在編輯任務上進行訓練。<lb/>這些結果驗證了我們的自我反思強化方法有效利用內在理解來引導高保真生成。<lb/>項目頁面：https://huangrh99.github.io/AlphaGRPO/
2605.12495.author: Runhui Huang et.al.
2605.12495.authors: Runhui Huang, Jie Wu, Rui Yang, Zhe Liu, Hengshuang Zhao
